sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_sum_map( `date` Date, `timeslot` DateTime, `statusMap` Nested(status UInt16, requests UInt64))ENGINE = Log;
SELECT sumMapFiltered([2, 3, 5])(statusMap.status, statusMap.requests) FROM test_sum_map WHERE date = '2023-10-01';
SELECT sumMapFiltered([1, 4])(statusMap.status, statusMap.requests) FROM test_sum_map WHERE date = '2023-10-02';
